# neon_organization_vpc_endpoint (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a VPC endpoint assigned to a Neon organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_organization_vpc_endpoint" "example" {
  org_id          = "your-organization-id"
  region_id       = "aws-us-east-1"
  vpc_endpoint_id = "vpce-abc123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_id` (String) The Neon organization ID.
- `region_id` (String) The Neon region ID.
- `vpc_endpoint_id` (String) The VPC endpoint ID.

### Read-Only

- `example_restricted_projects` (List of String) A list of example projects that are restricted to use this VPC endpoint (at most 3).
- `label` (String) A descriptive label for the VPC endpoint.
- `num_restricted_projects` (Number) The number of projects that are restricted to use this VPC endpoint.
- `state` (String) The current state of the VPC endpoint. Possible values are `new` or `accepted`.
